_readme: EXPERT-ITERATION league (Phase C, plan happy-quail). Main lane warm-starts from the fair gen-24 champion; gauntlet-v3 anchors seed the champion itself as a frozen PFSP peer (the league-needs-peers fix is automatic now). Data generation searches 25% of strategic decisions (Gumbel-48, self-model rollouts) and records pi; mode alphazero trains CE-to-pi + value-to-returns + 4-way placement aux. Eval + gauntlet always score the RAW net. Promotion every 4 gens vs gauntlet-v3 (champion rebaseline: 525/85.4%/29.1).
_exploration: AlphaZero-style: exploration comes from the SEARCH (nav pi-sampling at navTemperature + per-decision Gumbel noise), not softmax-sampling every decision — temp-1.0 sampled games ran to the 120-round cap and made search cost explode (14min/game).
_round2: ExIt round 2: few BIG searches (64 sims @ 8% of decisions) instead of many small (16 @ 25%) — round 1 was flat at 515/506/503/503/501 vs bar 550.
